arts.ttl: Celtic 'keen' to sign Scottish Championship midfield duo
arts.sum: Celtic are reportedly keen to sign highly-rated Airdrieonians duo Cole and Dylan Williams.

arts.ttl: Jeffrey Schlupp to make Celtic spot his own as Hoops go hunting for Hibs revenge – Scottish Cup squad revealed
arts.sum: The Hoops are out for revenge against Hibs as they look to seal a Scottish Cup semi-final place

arts.ttl: Alan Stubbs names current Celtic star he would have loved to play alongside, dubbed 'the best'
arts.sum: The last time Hibs won the Scottish Cup was in 2015-16 when Stubbs was in the dugout, as the former centre-back also represented Celtic for a five-year period. Cameron Carter-Vickers has been the best defender in Scotland for several years now, so it’s no surprise that Stubbs picked the American as the man he would have loved to have played alongside.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers goes all in as Celtic boss looks to avenge Easter Road defeat, predicted XI vs Hibs
arts.sum: Jeffrey Schlupp starts and Adam Idah is benched as Celtic look to beat Hibs in the Scottish Cup Celtic have a very good record against Hibs in the Scottish Cup. Having faced the Edinburgh side eight times wince 1980, the Hoops have won five, drawn 2 and lost just once.

arts.ttl: Rennes boss explains latest Kyogo Furuhashi snub
arts.sum: Rennes boss Habib Beye has lifted the lid on his decision to play a 17-year-old over former Celtic striker Kyogo Furuhashi.

arts.ttl: Championship side use Celtic as template, laud 'incredibly generous' Brendan Rodgers
arts.sum: Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers gave up some of his time recently to help out coaches from one of his former clubs.

arts.ttl: Celtic told they could have another Nicolas Kuhn on their hands after player was 'written off'
arts.sum: But it was just a case of the all-action winger needing time to settle in, before Kuhn has exploded this season and proven why many players coming into the Scottish league need that time. Tam McManus claimed that Yang was ‘written off’, but like Kuhn previously, he has now ‘really come into his game’, as he told PLZ Soccer.

arts.ttl: Celtic injury news and Predicted XI vs Hibs: Key change to spark Scottish Cup win
arts.sum: Celtic face Hibernian in the Scottish Cup on Sunday as Brendan Rodgers' team continue their hunt for a domestic treble.

arts.ttl: Inside Alistair Johnston's rise as Canada veteran reveals what he 'always knew'
arts.sum: Hibernian winger Junior Hoilett says he 'always knew' Alistair Johnston would become a top player.

arts.ttl: Player who 'has not let Celtic down' told he won't start vs Hibs in the Scottish Cup
arts.sum: Talking about the big game, pundits Gordon Dalziel and Hugh Keevins were conversing who should start in Celtic’s midfield, considering the strength Rodgers has to choose from. Responding to that, Gordon Dalziel said, “Yeah, yeah, listen, he’s not let Celtic down, but he’s [Brendan Rodgers] got to look at this Hibs side and treat them with such respect tomorrow.
